title: Simple appointment scheduling
goal: Book a routine annual physical with any available doctor sometime next week, in the afternoon.
hypothesis: Baseline: does the agent collect identity, offer real slots, and read the final booking back to confirm?
opening_line: Hi, I'd like to schedule a yearly physical sometime next week if you have anything in the afternoon.
wrap_up_when: you have a specific day and time confirmed, or are told none are available
